examples: The author has condensed a great deal of material into just 100 pages.
The steam was condensed rapidly by injecting cold water into the cylinder.
Radars used to track storms can detect water in the atmosphere only once it has condensed into clouds or raindrops.
Thai coffee is brewed strong, spiced with chicory and combined with condensed milk and ice.
This contraption extracts humidity from the air, creating moisture which is condensed and collected.
